summary: Completed testing of multi-file document support. All 25 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Documents tab shows multi-file indicators, Add File/Replace buttons work correctly, upload modal shows Multi badge and Document Label field for multi-file requirements, delete icons appear for multi-file documents, Checklist tab shows file count badges.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: API returns documents[] array instead of document object
Backend: Identity/RTW has allow_multiple_files=True
Backend: CV has allow_multiple_files=False (single-file)
Backend: DBS has allow_multiple_files=False (single-file)
Backend: Multi-file upload creates new document (not replace)
Backend: Single-file upload replaces existing document with version increment
Backend: Delete document from multi-file requirement works
Backend: Cannot delete document from single-file requirement (returns 400)
Backend: all_verified flag works correctly
Backend: Compliance score based on requirement completion, not file count
Backend: Document requirements have correct updated structure
Backend: Single-file requirements deduplicate to show only latest
Backend: One row per requirement (no duplicates)
Frontend: Documents tab shows Multi-file badge for Identity/RTW
Frontend: Documents tab shows file count badges (e.g., '3 files')
Frontend: Add File button appears for multi-file requirements
Frontend: Replace button appears for single-file requirements
Frontend: Verify All button appears for complete multi-file requirements
Frontend: Delete (trash) icons appear for multi-file documents
Frontend: Upload modal shows Multi badge in dropdown
Frontend: Upload modal shows Document Label field for multi-file requirements
Frontend: Checklist tab shows file count indicators
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_document_mapping.py (updated test to check for documents[] array instead of document object)
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee Olakunle Alonge (id: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77). Test documents uploaded for Identity/RTW (multi-file) and DBS (single-file) requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-file document support fully functional. API returns documents[] array instead of document object. Single-file requirements (CV, DBS, References) show Replace button and deduplicate to show only latest. Multi-file requirements (Identity/RTW, NMC Registration, Clinical Competency) show Add File button, file count badges, and delete icons. Upload modal shows Multi badge and Document Label field for multi-file requirements. Compliance score is based on requirement completion, not file count.

architectural_change_verified.single_file_deduplication: Only most recent document shown for single-file requirements
architectural_change_verified.multi_file_support: All documents shown for multi-file requirements with delete capability
